news.headline: Beverly Hills luxury resort secures $300M in new loan funding.
Capstone Association Management Becomes Part of the PMI Franchise Network in Sarasota, Florida
news.summary: Property management company, PMI Meridian Management, headquartered in Indianapolis, has recently acquired Capstone Association Management, a top association management firm in Sarasota, Florida. Following the acquisition, the company will operate under the new name PMI Capstone. This acquisition represents a notable expansion for PMI Meridian Management, establishing a presence in the Florida market and enhancing its standing in the association management sector. The move consolidates PMI Meridian's position as a key player in the industry.

news.headline: Law firm Edelson Lechtzin LLP investigates data breach affecting Pension Specialists Ltd. customers; suspicious activity detected on Feb. 24, 2024.
news.summary: Edelson Lechtzin LLP, a prominent national law firm specializing in class action cases, is currently conducting an investigation into allegations surrounding data privacy breaches impacting The Pension Specialists Ltd. ("TPS"). TPS became aware of potentially fraudulent activities around February 24, 2024. Individuals affected by this incident are encouraged to join the ongoing investigation led by Edelson Lechtzin LLP.

news.headline: Data breach at Innovative Renal Care investigated by Edelson Lechtzin LLP for American Renal Management customers.
news.summary: A national class action law firm, Edelson Lechtzin LLP, based in Newtown, Pennsylvania, revealed on February 19, 2025, that they are looking into allegations related to data privacy breaches at American Renal Management operating as Innovative Renal (IRC). IRC became aware of potential unauthorized access on its system on a specific date. The investigation is ongoing to determine the extent of the breach and the number of individuals impacted by the incident.

The total revenues for the quarter were $921.0 million, indicating growth from $877.0 million in the fourth quarter of fiscal 2023. The net income for the quarter stood at $41.2 million with a diluted net income per share of $0.83. Additionally, the Company recorded pre-tax net expenses.

news.headline: Lululemon's stock RS rating improves to 82 from 76, showing strong price performance. - Investor's Business Daily
news.summary: Lululemon Athletica has experienced an increase in its stock price performance, leading to a rise in its IBD Relative Strength Rating from 76 to 82. This upgrade signifies a stronger market position for the company.

news.headline: Lattice Semiconductor stock RS rating jumps from 78 to 84, indicating increasing price performance.
news.summary: Lattice Semiconductor has demonstrated an increase in price performance, resulting in an upgrade of its IBD Relative Strength Rating from 78 to 84. This rise in rating marks a positive trend in the stock's performance.

news.headline: Sylvamo to pay $0.45 per share dividend on April 29, for April 1 to June 30, 2025, to shareholders as of April 8.
news.summary: A global paper company, Sylvamo (NYSE: SLVM), headquartered in Memphis, Tennessee, announced a quarterly dividend of $0.45 per share for the second quarter of 2025, covering the period from April 1 to June 30. Shareholders as of the market close on April 8, 2025, will receive the dividend on April 29, 2025. Sylvamo operates mills across Europe, Latin America, and North America and aims to be the top choice for employees, suppliers, and investors. Through sustainable practices, Sylvamo converts renewable resources into paper products.

news.headline: Mativ Holdings, Inc. disclosed Q4 and full year 2024 results, excluding Engineered Papers business.
news.summary: In Alpharetta, Georgia, Mativ Holdings, Inc. ("Mativ" or the "Company") (NYSE: MATV) released its earnings report for the three months and full year that concluded on December 31, 2024. The Company completed the sale of its Engineered Papers business on November 30, 2023. Financial results for ongoing operations do not include Engineered Papers in any period. Adjusted figures are aligned with Generally Accepted Accounting Principles (GAAP) at the conclusion of this statement. Financial comparisons are made in reference to the previous year.

news.headline: Capstone Copper Corp reported Q4 2024 results: 53,942 tonnes copper production, $2.56 cash costs per pound. CEO pleased with record EBITDA.
news.summary: Capstone Copper Corp., a company listed on both the TSX and ASX exchanges, released their financial results for the three months and full year ending on December 31, 2024. In the fourth quarter of 2024, they reported a total copper production of 53,942 tonnes with C1 cash costs amounting to $2.56 per payable pound of copper produced. The company's CEO, John MacKenzie, highlighted the achievement of record copper production and EBITDA generation during the year. For more details, you can access Capstone's Q4 2024 webcast presentation.

news.headline: Clearwater Analytics reports $126.5M revenue in Q4 2024 and $451.8M for full year with 27.7% growth in fourth quarter. ARR at $474.9M.

Clearwater Analytics is a global leader in Software as a Service (SaaS) investment management, accounting, reporting, and analytics solutions.

news.headline: PDF Solutions is acquiring secureWISE to expand its semiconductor data platform. This will add remote access, monitoring, control for manufacturing equipment at nearly 200 semiconductor factories.

news.headline: Dickson Despommier, 84, advocated vertical farming in skyscrapers to tackle climate change and increase food production.
news.summary: A prominent microbiologist has gained recognition for promoting the concept of "vertical farming", which involves growing crops in high-rise structures. This innovative approach aims to address climate change issues while also providing food for a larger number of people.

news.headline: Lamar Advertising Co. declares $1.55 dividend/share, totaling at least $6.20 per share in 2025 to stockholders.
news.summary: Baton Rouge, Louisiana on February 19, 2025 - Lamar Advertising Company, traded as Nasdaq: LAMR, disclosed its declaration of a quarterly cash dividend of $1.55 per share. This dividend is set to be paid out on March 28, 2025, to all stockholders of record holding Lamar's Class A common stock and Class B common stock as of March 14, 2025. The board of directors of Lamar foresees that the combined quarterly distributions to stockholders for the year 2025, inclusive of the upcoming dividend scheduled for March 28, 2025, will be no less than $6.20 per common share.

news.headline: Stronghold Digital Mining urges stockholders to vote "FOR" the merger with Bitfarms at the special meeting on Feb. 27. ISS and Glass Lewis recommend the merger.
news.summary: On February 19, 2025, Stronghold Digital Mining, Inc. (NASDAQ: SDIG) revealed that Institutional Shareholder Services (ISS) and Glass Lewis & Co. have advised Stronghold stockholders to vote "FOR" the proposed merger with Bitfarms Ltd. (NASDAQ/TSX: BIT) at the special meeting on February 27, 2025. The merger is set to be a significant move for both companies, with Bitfarms being a prominent player in the industry. This announcement comes as a crucial step towards finalizing the merger, highlighting the growing support for the union between Stronghold and Bitfarms.

news.headline: Mister Car Wash announces Q4 ‘24 & full year results; record revenue & EBITDA; facing consumer challenges.
news.summary: In Tucson, Arizona, Mister Car Wash, Inc. (Nasdaq: MCW), the largest car wash brand in the U.S., disclosed its financial outcomes for the quarter and year concluding on December 31, 2024. The company expressed contentment with their fourth-quarter and full-year 2024 performance. Despite consumer challenges and heightened competition, Mister Car Wash achieved record revenue and EBITDA. The company noted an improvement in results as the year advanced. This progression was achieved amidst a tough consumer climate and increased market competition.

news.headline: Holley Performance Brands (NYSE: HLLY) to announce Q4 and full year 2024 results on March 11, 2025 at 8:30 am ET.
news.summary: Holley Performance Brands, a renowned automotive aftermarket performance solutions company trading on NYSE under the ticker symbol HLLY, has disclosed the scheduled announcement date for their financial performance in the fourth quarter and full year of 2024. The unveiling of Holley's financial results for Q4 and FY 2024 will take place on Tuesday, March 11, 2025, at 8:30 am (Eastern Time). A conference call and live webcast have been organized by the company to delve into the details of their financial standing during that period. This event will be crucial for investors and stakeholders to gain insights into the company's financial health and strategic outlook moving forward.

news.headline: Carvana reports record earnings for Q4 and FY 2024, becoming most profitable US automotive retailer. Shareholder letter for details.
Herbalife's Q4 net sales hit $1.2 billion, meeting guidance at high end, with 0.6% decline from Q4 ‘23. Adjusted EBITDA exceeds expectations.
news.summary: In Los Angeles, Herbalife Ltd. (NYSE: HLF) released its financial figures for the fourth quarter and full year ending on December 31, 2024. The Chairman and CEO, Michael Johnson, expressed positivity about the company’s achievements, highlighting three consecutive quarters of new distributor growth, a new CEO incoming, and significantly enhanced Adjusted EBITDA margins. The fourth quarter of 2024 saw net sales of $1.2 billion, indicating a decrease of 0.6% compared to Q4 of 2023, aligning with the upper range of projected guidance. This figure encompasses 330 basis points of FX impacts.
